data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a full audit trail for permission changes. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or records of permission changes, which are essential to confirm the existence of an audit trail. The absence of such evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of permission change records or audit trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
